summary: Comprehensive testing of Articles/Learn Content Management feature. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - Learn page displays articles with banners, search/filter works, article detail page shows content, admin can create articles.

ui_bugs.issue: One article banner image shows alt text instead of image (broken image URL or loading issue)

passed_tests: GET /api/articles - Returns list of published articles with categories
GET /api/articles/{article_id} - Get article detail with view increment
View count increments on each article request
Frontend Learn page loads with articles grid
Frontend search input filters articles correctly
Frontend category buttons filter articles correctly
Frontend article detail page displays content
Frontend admin create article dialog works
critical_code_review_comments: Articles module is well-structured with proper separation of public, authenticated, and admin routes
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
View count increment is implemented correctly in get_article endpoint
User progress tracking with points system is working correctly
Admin-only routes properly check ADMIN_EMAILS list
seed_data_creation: 4 test articles already exist in database (created by main agent via curl)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Articles/Learn feature is fully functional. Backend API tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_articles_api.py. 4 articles exist in the database across categories: Fondamentaux (1), Technique (2), Business (1). User has completed 1 article and earned 12 points. Admin can create/update/delete articles via the UI dialog.
